2603.23840.title: VehicleMemBench: An Executable Benchmark for Multi-User Long-Term Memory in In-Vehicle Agents
2603.23840.paper_summary: With the growing demand for intelligent in-vehicle experiences, vehicle-based agents are evolving from simple assistants to long-term companions. This evolution requires agents to continuously model multi-user preferences and make reliable decisions in the face of inter-user preference conflicts and changing habits over time. However, existing benchmarks are largely limited to single-user, static question-answer settings, failing to capture the temporal evolution of preferences and the multi-user, tool-interactive nature of real vehicle environments. To address this gap, we introduce VehicleMemBench, a multi-user long-context memory benchmark built on an executable in-vehicle simulation environment. The benchmark evaluates tool use and memory by comparing the post-action environment state with a predefined target state, enabling objective and reproducible evaluation without LLM-based or human scoring. VehicleMemBench includes 23 tool modules, and each sample contains over 80 historical memory events. Experiments show that powerful models perform well on direct instruction tasks but struggle in scenarios involving memory evolution, particularly when user preferences change dynamically. Even advanced memory systems struggle to handle domain-specific memory requirements in this environment. These findings highlight the need for more robust and specialized memory management mechanisms to support long-term adaptive decision-making in real-world in-vehicle systems. To facilitate future research, we release the data and code.
2603.23840.paper_summary_zh: 隨著對智能車載體驗的需求不斷增長，基於車輛的代理正在從簡單的助手演變為長期伴侶。這一演變要求代理持續建模多用戶的偏好，並在面對用戶之間的偏好衝突和隨時間變化的習慣時做出可靠的決策。然而，現有的基準主要限於單用戶、靜態的問答設置，無法捕捉偏好的時間演變以及真實車輛環境中的多用戶、工具互動特性。為了解決這一空白，我們推出了VehicleMemBench，這是一個基於可執行的車載模擬環境構建的多用戶長上下文記憶基準。該基準通過比較行動後的環境狀態與預定的目標狀態來評估工具使用和記憶，從而實現客觀且可重複的評估，而不依賴於基於LLM或人類評分。VehicleMemBench包含23個工具模塊，每個樣本包含超過80個歷史記憶事件。實驗表明，強大的模型在直接指令任務上表現良好，但在涉及記憶演變的場景中卻掙扎，特別是在用戶偏好動態變化的情況下。即使是先進的記憶系統也難以處理這一環境中的領域特定記憶需求。這些發現突顯了需要更強大和專門的記憶管理機制，以支持現實世界車載系統中的長期自適應決策。為了促進未來的研究，我們發布了數據和代碼。
2603.23840.author: Yuhao Chen et.al.
2603.23840.authors: Yuhao Chen, Yi Xu, Xinyun Ding, Xiang Fang, Shuochen Liu, Luxi Lin, Qingyu Zhang, Ya Li, Quan Liu, Tong Xu
